zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Camoys於1382年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG31歲，母親Elizabeth Louches30歲。他於1402年之前與Joan Poynings在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1421年3月28日在英國英格蘭素可特洛頓享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Camoys于1382年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG31岁，母亲Elizabeth Louches30岁。他于1402年之前与Joan Poynings在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1421年3月28日在英国英格兰素可特洛頓享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Camoys was born in 1382, in Sussex, England, his father, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Louches, was 30. He married Joan Poynings before 1402, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 28 March 1421, in Trotton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Camoys est né en 1382, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Louches, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joan Poynings avant 1402, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 28 mars 1421, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Camoys 1382 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Louches 30. Er hat vor 1402 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 28. März 1421 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Trotton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Camoys è nato il nel 1382 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Louches, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Joan Poynings prima del 1402, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 28 marzo 1421, nel Trotton, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Camoysが1382年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KGは31歳，母Elizabeth Louchesは30歳であった。1402年以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJoan Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1421年3月28日にイギリスイギリススセックストロットオンで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Camoys(이)가 1382년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Louches(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1402년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Joan Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1421년 3월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트로턴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Camoys nasceu em 1382, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Louches, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Poynings antes 1402, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 1421, em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Camoys родился в 1382 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Louches, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Poynings перед 1402 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 28 марта 1421 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Camoys nació en 1382, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Camoys 1st Baron Camoys KG, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Louches, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Joan Poynings antes de 1402, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1421, en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
